title: BEM-866 commit sha null diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
# Diagnose codex-runner commit/push/report path from workflow text and recent results.
wf = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = wf.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'codex_runner_exists': wf.exists(),
    'has_checkout': 'actions/checkout' in text,
    'has_git_add': 'git add' in text,
    'has_git_commit': 'git commit' in text,
    'has_git_push': 'git push' in text,
    'has_commit_sha_string': 'commit_sha' in text,
    'has_changed_files_string': 'changed_files' in text,
    'has_GITHUB_OUTPUT': 'GITHUB_OUTPUT' in text,
    'has_AI_PAT': 'AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT' in text,
}
# Count recent result JSONs with changed_files and null commit_sha.
resdir = Path('governance/codex/results')
null_count = 0
with_changes = 0
recent = []
if resdir.exists():
    for f in sorted(resdir.glob('*.json'))[-100:]:
        try:
            data = json.loads(f.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
        except:
            continue
        if data.get('changed_files'):
            with_changes += 1
            if not data.get('commit_sha'):
                null_count += 1
                recent.append(f.name)
status = 'COMMIT_SHA_NULL_SYSTEMIC' if with_changes and null_count == with_changes else 'COMMIT_SHA_PARTIAL'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_COMMIT_SHA_NULL_DIAG_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 commit sha null diag\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k,v in checks.items()) + '\n\nRecent changed results: ' + str(with_changes) + '\nNull commit_sha: ' + str(null_count) + '\nExamples:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + x for x in recent[:30]) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('commit sha null diagnosis: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
